title: Black Treacle Crumble
description: A traditional Ukrainian-inspired dessert featuring a tangy black treacle filling topped with a crunchy crumble mixture.
instructions: 2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sliced apple and black treacle. Mix well to coat the apple slices evenly.
3. Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, cold butter, brown sugar, rolled oats, and cinnamon. Mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the apple mixture.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
